name: sec-opendata
description: Pull Thai SEC Open Data from api.sec.or.th across digital assets, funds, Licence Check, One Report, provident funds, debt, equity, ESG, operators, professionals, investors, and raw /v1 endpoints.

interface.shortDescription: Fetch Thai SEC Open Data across all portal categories.
interface.longDescription: A Codex skill and Python CLI for SEC Open Data Thailand. It supports legacy fund products plus current /v1 portal endpoints for digital assets, funds, Licence Check, One Report, provident funds, debt, equity, ESG, operators, professionals, investors, and future categories.
defaultPrompt: Fetch a One Report financial statement.
List SEC portal API key scopes.
